IOU Sustainability and Innovation Center and cOmmited Collaboration

MENU

IOU Sustainability and Innovation Center and cOmmited Collaboration

We measure the carbon emissions of our students with the carbon meter we have prepared together with Istanbul Okan University Sustainability and Innovation Center (SIM) and Fibabanka subsidiary

cOmmited

. According to their carbon footprint, our students will be able to get a carbon neutral certificate.

We held our protocol ceremony with the participation of our esteemed Rector

Güliz MUĞAN

, Fibabanka Deputy General Manager in charge of treasury

İbrahim TOPRAK

, Investments Financial Services Director

Canefe TATLISU

and

cOmmited

General Manager

Levent KÖSEOĞLU

. We hope our cooperation will create impact and benefit! 🌎
